prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-5HKMSH3-SML-SLVR Product Type: UTILITY_KNIFE Brand (from catalog): Universal Hobby Existing Title: Hobby Knife Metal Scalpel Handle #3 Tool Arts and Crafts - 5 inch Description: For precision cutting, nothing beats a scalpel. These hobby knives are made from reliable industrial metal, ensuring that you'll get the job done right. The scalpel handles will provide you with the sturdy grip you need for precision projects.

Take your craft to the next level with these great scalpel handles. You'll definitely want to have these knives handy around the house for the next time you tackle a precision or DIY project Search Terms: scalpel knife blades handle nurse accessories for work gifts tweezers precision craft knife medical supplies scissors bag kit assistant accessories wound care products hobby knife craft knife box cutter retractable blades safety craft supplies Features: - Ergonomic Shape - Grooves for Better Grip - Lightweight - Solid Metal - Color: Silver === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Hobby 5 inch Silver Metal Scalpel Handle

anthropic.title_differentiation: Precision Craft Knife, Ergonomic Metal Handle, Grooved Grip, Lightweight, Arts And Crafts

openai.title_differentiation: Solid Metal, Ergonomic Grip, Grooved Handle, Lightweight, Precision Cutting, DIY And Craft Use, Easy Control
